this
Mars (Kuja) had the Moon (Chandra) along with him, the
husband would be traveling in nature. If the Mars (Kuja) had
Sun (Ravi) with him, she gets an arrogant, short tempered and
egoistic husband. In the male chart, if Mars (Kuja) is posited
along with sukra (Venus), the native would get a stubborn
adamant wife.
If Venus (Sukra) conjoined with Mars (Kuja) and
Rahu, the wife would be authoritative and the husband has to
listen to her. Otherwise, hostility would be created. Ifthe
significator of wife, Venus (Sukra) is conjoined with Jupiter
(Guru)+ Mercury (Budha), the wife would be highfly educated
and also be a famous personality. If there is a combination of
Sukra (Venus) with Jupiter (Guru) and Saturn (Sani), she will
have a profession equal to respectable teaching.
If Su.kta* (Venus) is conjoined with or has a combination
with Mercury (budha) and Moon (Chandra), she will be good
eloquacious, proficient, and will have easy grasping power. If
